title: Feeling p-values through re-splitting
tagline: A tiny interactive for exact p-values with 10 numbers
summary: Start with two tiny samples, re-split the combined values in all possible ways, and see a p-value as an exact fraction instead of a mysterious ritual.
highlights: Switch between a similar-samples case and a very-different-samples case.
See the observed mean gap, all 252 exact re-splits, and the exact p-value.
Generate random re-splits from the same 10 numbers and compare them to the observed split.
